details.title: \textbf{Agentic Wrapper}
descriptions: Architected the AI layers of the product from scratch so agentic AI could make data-driven decisions and support an AI-native product approach.
Introduced a \textbf{RAG layer} over more than \textbf{20,000} financial documents, streamlining the agentic workflow so brokers could make data-driven decisions with grounded retrieval.
details.languages: Stack:- Prompt Engineering, RAG, Agentic toolkits, Gemini, Grok, LangChain
details.effect: Drove \$\textbf{100K+} revenue with agentic RAG automating data-driven broker decisions.
details.scale: Serving \textbf{100K} real estate companies with a segmented AI knowledge base spanning \textbf{millions} of data points.

details.title: \textbf{Outreach Funnel}
descriptions: Built an outreach funnel that lifted deal flow to roughly \textbf{10x} per month from quality leads through niche AI-powered outreach and filtered deal targeting.
Redesigned context engineering for the data enrichment pipeline to improve lead quality before downstream outreach.
details.languages: Stack:- SmartLead, Amazon SES, Playwright, Puppeteer
details.effect: Increased engagement roughly \textbf{10x}, moving deal volume from about one per month to double digits.
details.scale: Outreach to \textbf{10K+} leads per month from a growing pool of \textbf{500K+} leads auto-ingested from real-world newsletters.

details.title: \textbf{Lead Management System}
descriptions: Shipped the Broker Velocity Engine to gamify the broker experience—more output in less time, more deals with AI assistance, and fewer repetitive tasks.
details.languages: Stack:- Data Modeling, ETL, PostgreSQL, Redis, BullMQ
details.effect: Gamification attracts strong brokers and supports higher revenue.
details.scale: 10+ brokers managing 1,000+ deals and \$\textbf{100K+} in revenue across \textbf{20K+} properties.

stack: Stack:- Scala, Java, SQL, Spark, Kafka, PySpark, HDFS

details.title: \textbf{DANTE (Data Anomaly Tracker)}
descriptions: Conceptualized our first configurable data quality tools, which fortified data integrity and optimized parallel data reading, leading to a \textbf{60\%} reduction in processing time for \textbf{>100GB} workloads.
EQ Tracer: A tool to \textbf{monitor summative metric trends} across configurable hierarchies with dynamic alerting mechanisms to filter out noise data, ensuring accurate insights.
Ratio Tracer: A tool for \textbf{outlier detection} using customizable percentile thresholds, enabling the proactive identification and mitigation of anomalies.
PM Tracer: A logging and monitoring tool that aggregates data from multiple sources, \textbf{providing detailed coverage and mismatch analysis} for enhanced data quality and system reliability.
details.scale: Compared nearly \textbf{3 billion} and \textbf{200 million} rows in \textbf{30 minutes}.

details.title: \textbf{StopLoss System}
descriptions: Migrated Spark Streaming to Structured Streaming, achieving a \textbf{50\%} reduction in latency and stronger error handling with exactly-once semantics that stabilized the data audit pipeline.

Implemented \textbf{A/B testing} to understand traffic patterns and loss thresholds per entity, driving a \textbf{15\%} reduction in overall losses and supporting R\&D with measurable profitability gains.
details.languages: Stack:- Java, Structured Streaming, Batch Processing
details.scale: Ingesting \textbf{50k records per second} from Kafka and processing in \textbf{5-minute} buckets.

stack: Stack:- Ruby on Rails, Python, Redis, Amazon SQS

details.title: \textbf{Discord Automation and Notification System}
descriptions: Pioneered automation for group moderation on Discord through the web app, unlocking peer learning while reducing moderation overhead and lifting engagement.
details.languages: Stack:- Ruby on Rails, Python, Amazon SQS
details.scale: Sending \textbf{2k messages per day}. Reaching \textbf{10k users} in \textbf{3 months}.
